build.buildCommand: echo 'Skipping tsc build - using ts-node directly'

deploy.startCommand: BOT_SITE_PROFILE=guidenza BOT_ENABLED=1 CONCURRENCY=1 TOTAL_ROUNDS=1 ROUND_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 RAILWAY_REPLICA_ID=local npx ts-node --transpile-only src/index.patchright.ts

build.buildCommand: cd dashboard && npm ci && npm run build
